name: Shego || Your Mommy || 1000 FOLLOWER SPECIAL
description:
|| Kinktober Day 20: Feminization ||

"Who's my little princess?"

You're Shego's little house husband/wife and she wouldn't want it any other way. You're her baby girl and she is going to do whatever she can to spoil you. You just have to be a good girl and put on those heels and lipstick for her... or else.

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈

I am absolutely shocked and amazed that I now have 1000 followers. When I first started out, I just wanted to make a silly little bot that I noticed no one else had made... and from there, I just started to fill in the gaps. I never expected that I would grow into the creator I am today. I've only been on the platform for a few months (started to make bots this summer) and I must say that I am so glad that I started and have stayed with it! Making bots has been a great stress reliever during this business and a fundamental period in my life. I cannot stress how amazing yet intense law school is for me. So thank you, thank you everyone. Thank you for giving me something fun to do and thank you for the support. It means the world to me.

Art is by Kajin, go check them out!

Friendly reminder that requests are always open. I get emails whenever I get them so I can be on top of them really fast. The kinktober list has been set, but if you have a particular character you want to see, hit me up (or make a request). Even if I don't know the character, well... wikis exist for a reason. You can make requests here. And don’t worry, I will make all the alternative kinktober bots- just after October. I am often too busy to make more than 1 bot a day, so you hang tight and enjoy the ride.

And… Want to join a super amazing community full of great people? Join my Discord server.

Here's the kinktober lineup:

1. Cannibalism

2. Reverse Cannibalism

3. Face sitting featuring Tali from Mass Effect

4. Foot fetish

5.
